request: Bugfix: /commit Step 6 stamps backlog closure post-commit via sweep.mjs but defines no step to commit the result, so the stamp strands uncommitted in the working tree and (per superseded-at) is at risk of auto-deletion by the next /memory-flush before it ever enters git. Make /commit carry the closure stamp into version control within its own commit cycle, honoring the --amend hard-block (Art. VII) and the sweep.mjs single-writer rule. Source: docs/rca/2026-06-06-backlog-closure-stamp-stranded-post-commit.md (AI-02). Related backlog: backlog-status-not-auto-flipped-after-pickup-ac5d.
